title: Syzygium tamilnadense
taxonomy: Syzygium tamilnadense is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is a tree that is endemic to the Western Ghats in India. The classification of this species places it within the genus Syzygium, which includes many other species of plants commonly known as "water apple" or "jambolan". The Myrtaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that are native to many parts of the world. This classification helps to identify and distinguish Syzygium tamilnadense from other related species.
